label: 7971 Short title
text: This subpart may be cited as the “Pro-Children Act of 2001”.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThis subpart, referred to in text, was in the original “this part”, and was translated as reading “this subpart”, to reflect the probable intent of Congress. redesignated part C of title IV of as subpart 5 of part F of title VIII of , which is classified to this subpart.Pub.
